mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_registration (activity_id, user_id, registration_time, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{registrationTime}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_registration WHERE user_id = #{userId}
